name: Chocolate Almond Cake - Part 2
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: TASTE OF HOME - OCT/NOV 95
In a large mixing bowl, cream butter and sugar. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Mix in sour cream and extracts. Combine flour, cocoa, baking soda and salt. Alternate adding to the creamed mixture with buttermilk. Pour into a greased 10-inch fluted tube pan. Bake at 350 degrees for 50-55 minutes or until done. Cool in pan for 10 minutes before removing to a wire rack. For frosting, cream butter, sugar and extracts until smooth. Add milk until frosting reaches desired spreading consistency. Frost cooled cake. Decorate with almonds. Yield: 12-16 servings.
